name: Bo-Peeps-a-Crock
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp chicken broth mix (or 1 quart water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the meat to fit in your crockpot and remove as much fat as possible.
2. Combine all ingredients in the crockpot.
3. Cook on high for 4 hours, then let cool. Skim off any excess fat that rises to the top.
4. Reheat thoroughly before serving for up to 6 hours at a time over two days (store refrigerated between uses).
5. Serve with acorn or butternut squash cut in half and baked, placed in a bowl with the shell filled with meat and soup. Add rice (Basmati or Jasmine preferred) and green beans for a perfect, easy meal.
6. Note: This dish is high in fat even after cooling and skimming, but it is sugar-free and low in sodium. It can be enjoyed occasionally as a special treat, even when dieting.
